name: Policosanol
summary: Human evidence for policosanol is inconsistent; early positive trials have not been reliably replicated in independent studies.
description: Policosanol has inconsistent clinical signals; any proposed benefits likely relate to lipid metabolism and oxidative pathways but replication is lacking.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.6: Independent trials failed to reproduce strong lipid benefits; block monetized cholesterol claims.
claimMap.notes: v9.6: Independent trials failed to reproduce strong lipid benefits; block monetized cholesterol claims.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 5–20 mg/day used in older studies, but benefit is inconsistent
